output.code:
# Read the file and print content and repr to inspect exact characters.
path = "/mnt/data/file-35uRpt73Hbv6Qgj93XZ7Ri-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "rb") as f:
    data_bytes = f.read()
# Try to decode as utf-8
try:
    text = data_bytes.decode('utf-8')
except UnicodeDecodeError:
    text = data_bytes.decode('utf-8', errors='replace')

print("---- File content START ----")
print(text)
print("---- File content END ----")
print("\n--- repr ---")
print(repr(text))

text = text  # from previous cell
candidates = [
    "وَمَن يَكُن حَلِيمًا وَمَن يَسْرِف فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ غَنِيٌ عَنْهُ",
    "لا بُخلَ فيما يُعتَدُّ بِهِ",
    "وَلَوْ أَنَّ قُرَيْشًا يُفْتَنُونَ فِي الَّذِي يُوعَدُونَ مِن شَرِّ الدَّجَالِ وَرِقَامٍ وَنِفَاقٍ وَجَمعٍ",
    "لا تُبَخِلِ المَرءَ في حَياتِهِ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يُبَخِلُ مَن يُبَخِلُ وَيُعطي مَن يُعطي"
]

occurrences = []
for cand in candidates:
    start = text.find(cand)
    if start == -1:
        print("Not found:", cand)
    else:
        end = start + len(cand)
        occurrences.append((cand, start, end))
        print("Found:", cand)
        print("Start:", start, "End:", end)
        print("Snippet around:", repr(text[max(0,start-40):min(len(text),end+40)]))
        print()

# Also find repeated occurrences of first candidate
cand = candidates[0]
start = text.find(cand)
second_start = text.find(cand, start+1)
print("First candidate occurrences:", start, second_start)

cand = candidates[0]
indices = []
start = 0
while True:
    pos = text.find(cand, start)
    if pos == -1:
        break
    indices.append((pos, pos+len(cand)))
    start = pos + len(cand)
indices

spans = [
    ("وَمَن يَكُن حَلِيمًا وَمَن يَسْرِف فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ غَنِيٌ عَنْهُ", 326, 390, "Aya"),
    ("لا بُخلَ فيما يُعتَدُّ بِهِ", 505, 532, "Hadeeth"),
    ("وَلَوْ أَنَّ قُرَيْشًا يُفْتَنُونَ فِي الَّذِي يُوعَدُونَ مِن شَرِّ الدَّجَالِ وَرِقَامٍ وَنِفَاقٍ وَجَمعٍ", 658, 764, "Aya"),
    ("لا تُبَخِلِ المَرءَ في حَياتِهِ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يُبَخِلُ مَن يُبَخِلُ وَيُعطي مَن يُعطي", 882, 969, "Hadeeth"),
    ("وَمَن يَكُن حَلِيمًا وَمَن يَسْرِف فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ غَنِيٌ عَنْهُ", 1199, 1263, "Aya")
]
for span_text, start, end, ctype in spans:
    raw_slice = text[start:end]
    print("expected:", span_text)
    print("raw_slice:", raw_slice)
    print("match:", raw_slice == span_text)
    print("len:", len(span_text), len(raw_slice))
    print("start,end:", start, end)
    print()
